# opnsense_kea_dhcpv6_settings (Resource)

Manages the Kea DHCPv6 general settings on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `dhcp_socket_type` (String) DHCP socket type: raw or udp.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable the Kea DHCPv6 server.
- `firewall_rules` (Boolean) Automatically add firewall rules for the service.
- `interfaces` (Set of String) Interfaces the DHCPv6 server listens on.
- `manual_config` (Boolean) Manage the Kea config file manually (disable GUI management).
- `valid_lifetime` (Number) Default lease valid lifetime in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
